name: The Brighton Pier Group PLC
summary: The Brighton Pier Group PLC operates leisure and entertainment assets in the United Kingdom. The company owns and operates Brighton Palace Pier that offers a range of attractions, including 2 arcades and 18 funfair rides, as well as various on-site hospitality and catering facilities. It also operates and manages 12 premium bars under the Embargo Republica, Lola Lo, Po Na Na, Le Fez, Lowlander, Smash, and Coalition names; and operates 8 indoor mini golf sites at high footfall retail and leisure centers. The company was formerly known as Eclectic Bar Group plc and changed its name to The Brighton Pier Group PLC in April 2016. The Brighton Pier Group PLC was founded in 2006 and is based in London, the United Kingdom.
